title: SOLID, Code Smells, and Evidence-Driven Refactoring · Runtime Lens: Oop Single Responsibility
summary: Evolve a growing circulation system without changing its verified external behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop single responsibility increment in a refactored maintainable service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Assign responsibilities by cohesive reason to change rather than forcing one method or one field per class.
Group state changes into atomic application operations with clear success, rollback, and idempotency behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
